title: Silhouette Canvas & More
excerpt: It's that time again - Silhouette has a jam packed promotion and giveaway for you. This time it's with a ton of specialty items. As much as I wanted to dive right in and use up more than just the…
body:
It's that time again - Silhouette has a jam packed promotion and giveaway for you. This time it's with a ton of specialty items. As much as I wanted to dive right in and use up more than just the adhesive backed canvas, I only really only had a limited amount of time. I decided to keep it as simple as possible by just adding some watercolors.

After realizing the sun was streaming in from the window, I decided to take my painting task outdoors. You may have seen this photo I posted yesterday on Instagram, looking up at the palm tree in the neighbor's yard. I let it dry for a few minutes out in the sunshine.

I went in and started working on the first scrapbook layout of Jack. The photos were printed by Persnickety Prints as 3x4's with a matte finish.

Visit Silhouette and use the promo code: TANGERINE through October 24 to get any of these:

(1) The list of specialty media plus a Silhouette CAMEO® for $269.99 (savings over $120 from retail cost $383.90)

  • 1 cardstock essentials pack (new product)

  • 1 pack printable adhesive kraft paper (new product)

  • 1 pack printable clear sticker paper

  • 1 pack temporary tattoo paper

  • 1 pack printable cotton canvas (new product)

  • 1 pack chipboard

  • 1 pack printable silver foil

  • 1 pack printable magnet paper

  • 1 pack double-sided adhesive

(2) The list of specialty media plus a Silhouette Portrait™ for $129.99 (savings over $110 from retail cost $263.90)

  • 1 cardstock essentials pack (new product)

  • 1 pack printable adhesive kraft paper (new product)

  • 1 pack printable clear sticker paper

  • 1 pack temporary tattoo paper

  • 1 pack printable cotton canvas (new product)

  • 1 pack chipboard

  • 1 pack printable silver foil

  • 1 pack printable magnet paper

  • 1 pack double-sided adhesive

(3) 30% off on all specialty media

That's a lot to take in! Click here to take advantage of this month’s discount and don’t forget to enter TANGERINE as the promo code valid through October 24.

Now for the really fun part... Silhouette wants to give one of you - my dear readers - a Silhouette Portrait™!

GIVEAWAY CLOSED: To enter: Leave a comment telling us what's making you smile. Open to US residents only. (Sorry internationals!) Giveaway will close on Monday, October 21 at 5am and a random winner will be selected and announced here shortly after. Good luck everyone!

And the winner is: #50 - CiJi says: October 15, 2013 at 5:12 pm

I love your layout!! Life in general is making me smile lately.  All of the fall activities coming up are already making me smile!! Thanks for the chance to win, I do not have a cameo yet!

CONGRATS!

Remember, there is still time to take advantage of this month’s discount and TANGERINE as the promo code valid through October 24 at Silhouette.
